meta_doc: Each template carries discoverability metadata so an authoring LLM (via the studio MCP list_templates tool) can pick the right template from a course-author intent WITHOUT fetching every config. Fields: when_to_use (intent triggers — when the LLM SHOULD reach for this), avoid_when (anti-patterns), media_profile (text-heavy|balanced|image-first|image-only|video|data|code|diagram), text_density (none|low|medium|high), layout (one-line shape), tags (free keywords for matching). Full slot schema stays in each templates/<id>/config.yaml and is returned by get_template.

templates.name: Title Slide
templates.when_to_use: Open a course, module, or major section. The very first slide; a big statement headline with optional subtitle.
templates.avoid_when: Mid-lesson content, or when you need imagery — use section-header for chapter breaks.
templates.layout: centered big headline + subtitle, no media

templates.name: Section Header
templates.when_to_use: Divider between chapters/modules. Big chapter number + section title; signals 'new part starts here'.
templates.avoid_when: The first slide of the whole course (use title) or for regular content.
templates.layout: huge chapter numeral left, title + description right

templates.name: Bullet List
templates.when_to_use: Enumerate 3-6 discrete points, takeaways, or features. The default 'list of things' slide.
templates.avoid_when: More than ~6 items (split slides), or when each item deserves an image (use image-grid/feature-cards).

templates.name: Two Column
templates.when_to_use: Compare two related text blocks side by side, or split a topic into two parallel ideas.
templates.avoid_when: A true A-vs-B contrast with winner framing (use comparison) or image+text (use img-text).

templates.name: Image and Text
templates.when_to_use: Explain ONE concept with a supporting image beside a short paragraph. The workhorse 'concept + visual' slide.
templates.avoid_when: You want the image to dominate (use big-image/full-bleed) or multiple images (use image-grid).
templates.layout: image pane one side, title+body the other

templates.name: Image Slide
templates.when_to_use: Show one image with a short caption. Screenshot, product shot, single illustrative photo.
templates.avoid_when: The image should bleed edge-to-edge (use full-bleed) or you need accompanying explanation (use img-text).

templates.name: Image Row
templates.when_to_use: Show 2-5 images side by side as equal peers — a set of examples, steps-as-photos, or a gallery strip.
templates.avoid_when: Images need captions/titles per cell as cards (use feature-cards) or a single hero (use big-image).
templates.layout: horizontal row of evenly-spaced images + optional title

templates.name: Quote
templates.when_to_use: Highlight a memorable quote, principle, or testimonial with attribution.
templates.avoid_when: A short emphasis statement without an author (use big-statement) or a definition (use callout).

templates.name: Callout
templates.when_to_use: Draw attention to a key warning, tip, definition, or 'remember this' note with an icon/label.
templates.avoid_when: A full quote (use quote) or normal body content.
templates.layout: labeled box with icon + title + body

templates.name: Code Block
templates.when_to_use: Show a code snippet, command, or config with syntax styling — programming/technical lessons.
templates.avoid_when: Explaining code conceptually without showing it (use img-text/diagram).

templates.name: Steps / Timeline
templates.when_to_use: Show an ordered process, sequence, or timeline of 3-5 steps.
templates.avoid_when: Unordered points (use bullet-list) or branching flows (use diagram).

templates.name: KPI Grid
templates.when_to_use: Show a grid of key numbers/metrics with labels and optional deltas.
templates.avoid_when: A single hero number (use stat-number) or a chart (use chart).

templates.name: Data Table
templates.when_to_use: Present structured tabular data — rows and columns of values.
templates.avoid_when: Comparison of 2-3 options (use comparison) or metrics (use kpi).

templates.name: Chart
templates.when_to_use: Visualize trends/proportions with a chart image or chart spec.
templates.avoid_when: Discrete numbers (use kpi) or raw data (use table).

templates.name: Blank
templates.when_to_use: Escape hatch — a blank canvas when no template fits and you need raw HTML control.
templates.avoid_when: Almost always — prefer a real template so the deck stays consistent.

templates.name: Big Statement
templates.when_to_use: One short, punchy sentence that should land hard — a thesis, a provocation, a key idea. Minimalist: huge type, almost no other text.
templates.avoid_when: An attributed quote (use quote) or a list of ideas (use bullet-list).

templates.name: Full-Bleed Image
templates.when_to_use: Edge-to-edge hero image with an overlaid title — high-impact section opener or mood-setting visual. Maximum image, minimum text.
templates.avoid_when: The image needs a caption beside text (use img-text) or must be uncropped (use image).

templates.name: Big Image + Label
templates.when_to_use: A large dominant image with a small label/title strip — let the visual carry the slide. Image-first concept reveal.
templates.avoid_when: Image should fully bleed (use full-bleed) or needs a paragraph (use img-text).
templates.layout: large framed image + compact title bar

templates.name: Image Grid
templates.when_to_use: Show 4-6 images in a grid (2x2 / 3x2) — a mosaic of examples, a moodboard, or a set of outputs/screenshots.
templates.avoid_when: Few images in a line (use image-row) or images needing per-cell text (use feature-cards).

templates.name: Comparison (A vs B)
templates.when_to_use: Contrast two options head-to-head — before/after, old/new, this-vs-that — each with a label and bullet points.
templates.avoid_when: Two parallel non-competing ideas (use two-column) or 3+ options (use table).
templates.layout: two labeled panels with a center divider/VS

templates.name: Stat Number
templates.when_to_use: One giant hero number/percentage with a short label — a single statistic that should shock or anchor.
templates.avoid_when: Several metrics (use kpi) or a trend (use chart).

templates.name: Feature Cards
templates.when_to_use: Show 3-4 features/concepts each as a card with an icon or image + short title + one line. Minimalist, image-forward feature overview.
templates.avoid_when: Plain text points (use bullet-list) or pure images (use image-grid).
templates.layout: row of 3-4 icon/image cards with title + caption

templates.name: Image + Quote
templates.when_to_use: A portrait/photo beside a quote with attribution — testimonial with a face, or a person + their words.
templates.avoid_when: Quote without an image (use quote) or a generic concept image (use img-text).
templates.layout: portrait image one side, quote + author other

templates.name: Title over Image
templates.when_to_use: Course/module opener that pairs a headline with a strong supporting image in a split layout — warmer than the text-only title.
templates.avoid_when: Pure text opener (use title) or full-bleed hero (use full-bleed).
